reasoning: The Comments History contains a critical FRAUD ALERT noting this customer has 11 refunds in 73 days (85% refund rate) with prior claims of 'item not received' despite confirmed delivery. Per protocol, this requires escalation to Loss Prevention rather than direct refund processing.
